_README: Tokens are stored HASHED at rest (RFC-005 §5.9). The 'token' field is sha256:<hex>, never the plaintext. The example hashes below correspond to the plaintexts 'secret-mythos' / 'secret-lena' — replace them. To set your own: 'node scripts/rotate-tokens.mjs --hash <plaintext>', or mint fresh tokens with 'node scripts/rotate-tokens.mjs --file identity.json'.
